Now, the problem says that when we divide this sum by (n + 5), the remainder is 17. So mathematically, this means: [n(n + 1)/2]² ≡ 17 mod (n + 5) Which can be rewritten as: [n(n + 1)/2]² - 17 ≡ 0 mod (n + 5) In other words, (n + 5) divides [n(n + 1)/2]² - 17.
